characters.appearance: Older Asian male, heavy build, light complexion. He has short black hair parted to the side and wears dark-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: White polo shirt with a small logo on the left chest, blue jeans.

characters.appearance: Young South Asian male, medium build, medium complexion. He has short dark hair and a full, neatly trimmed beard.
characters.wardrobe: Black denim jacket over a plain white t-shirt. He wears a silver watch on his left wrist.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आज professionals के लिए सबसे बड़ी problem क्या है? [What is the biggest problem for professionals today?]
Character A says: English में बात करने की hesitation. Supernova इसे जड़ से खत्म कर रहा है। [The hesitation to speak in English. Supernova is eliminating it from the root.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the audience by addressing a major pain point: English hesitation.
- Establishes authority and introduces Supernova as the ultimate solution.
- Sets a serious, empathetic tone for career-focused learners.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
BIGGEST PROBLEM
FOR PROFESSIONALS
ENGLISH HESITATION
Supernova
eliminates it
from the root
Speak Confidently

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Let me show you how it works. [Let me show you how it works.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the problem statement to the practical demonstration.
- Introduces a younger, relatable character to guide the user.
- Builds anticipation for the app features.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Let me show you
how it works

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: बस app खोलो और अपने AI tutor के साथ practice शुरू करो। [Just open the app and start practicing with your AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core mechanism of the app (AI tutor).
- Emphasizes ease of use and accessibility.
- Replaces the 'works in any app' tech feature with 'practice anytime' learning feature.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
just open
the app
and practice with
your AI tutor
hello

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Interview की तैयारी करनी है? "Actually, um... my strengths are..." AI आपकी गलतियां बिना judge किए ठीक करता है। [Want to prepare for an interview? "Actually, um... my strengths are..." AI corrects your mistakes without judging.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's utility for high-stakes real-world scenarios (interviews).
- Shows how the AI handles hesitation and natural speech.
- Highlights the psychological benefit: correction without judgment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Actually, um... my strengths are...
FIXES GRAMMAR INSTANTLY

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Real-life situations के लिए भी ये best है। [It's also best for real-life situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Bridges the gap between interview prep and everyday workplace English.
- Keeps the pacing brisk and engaging.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Customer से बात करनी हो या boss से, "Sir, your report is ready." Supernova आपको सही words और confidence देता है। [Whether talking to a customer or a boss, "Sir, your report is ready." Supernova gives you the right words and confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces niche coding demo with a relatable workplace communication scenario.
- Focuses on vocabulary building and confidence generation.
- Shows practical application for tier-2/3 working professionals.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Sir, your report is ready.
BUILDS VOCABULARY AUTOMATICALLY
BOOSTS YOUR CONFIDENCE

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: And the best part is, आप अकेले में practice कर सकते हो। [And the best part is, you can practice in private.]
Character B says: (Whispering) I want to speak fluent English. [(Whispering) I want to speak fluent English.]
Character B says: And it guides you perfectly. [And it guides you perfectly.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the embarrassment/shyness learners feel when practicing English aloud.
- Repurposes the whispering feature as a privacy/comfort benefit.
- Proves the AI's accuracy even with quiet, hesitant speech.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
And the best
part is
you can
practice in private
I want to speak fluent English
and it
guides you perfectly

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: आज Supernova हज़ारों Indians की मदद कर रहा है, ताकि वो confident English बोलें और life में आगे बढ़ें। [Today, Supernova is helping thousands of Indians so they can speak confident English and move ahead in life.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides social proof tailored to the Indian market (thousands of Indians vs Fortune 500).
- Ties English fluency directly to career growth and life progress.
- Ends on a warm, encouraging, and aspirational note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
is helping thousands
of Indians
speak confidently
and move ahead
in life every year
